notes: Master-Reorg Ship B4 (router gating, FINAL part 4 of 4) — the airtight backstop + host-hardening. Redesign-only; ?legacy=1 byte-identical (adversarially verified, 3 lenses + a delta pass). (1) CENTRAL GUARD at the top of showPage(): under redesign_isOn(), only cmd/work/ref + the sanctioned 'master' door (rd_openMasterFile) may activate; every other legacy id redirects to its redesign home and returns BEFORE the page swap and showPage's own nav_push — so a legacy surface can never paint and a legacy p: can never re-enter nav state. Redirect table: sop+known tool o: (bom/manifest/portmap/rackmap) → rd_openOpsTool(o) [OPS search hits land the exact tool]; sop → showWorkTab('deploy'); fiber → showRefTab('rf-optics'); cli → showRefTab('rf-cli'); power → rd_openPlatforms() [canonical .175 door, clears stale plat detail]; scan → showWorkTab('scan'); twin → showWorkTab('issues'); anything else (triage/compass/unknown) → phantomToast 'Not in the new UI yet' + showMode(_rdMode) [no-silent-failure rule]. This closes the LIVE Ref-search leak (5 TRIAGE INDEX entries carry no ref: and called showPage('triage') directly) + stale pre-Ship-B history replays + ungated direct callers (goFiberTriage). Verified: no recursion (every redirect re-enters showPage exactly once via a whitelisted id), scanner-close/wake-lock side effects still run exactly once, redirect targets exist cold-at-restore and on live taps. (2) HANDOFF FLOW FIX (adversarial-verify BLOCKER catch): _handoff_launch was un-gated and handoff_showGenerator/handoff_showLog rendered into hard-coded #ops-content — pre-B4 the flow worked *via the pg-sop leak*; the guard would have turned every rd handoff door (Work card, Command tile, quick action, NBA routes) into a silent invisible render. Fixed: _handoff_launch rd-gated (deploy_goToDashboard pattern: showWorkTab('deploy') + 80ms generator render), both renderers repointed to deploy_opsHost() (legacy: the SAME #ops-content element — identical). (3) nav_restore d==='command' now paints deploy_opsHost() (was the hidden legacy #ops-content under rd; legacy identical). (4) Orphaned d==='ingest' restore branch (no pusher anywhere since v1.6.91, git-proven) replaced by rd-GATED d==='mscope'/'mscope-staged' branches that drill via showWorkTab('deploy') then dispatch — Back into the scope wizard now restores it visibly under rd. rd-gated because legacy also pushes d:'mscope' but has NEVER re-dispatched it on restore (Rule 7 byte-identity). (5) showStab's legacy-p: push suppressed under rd (B4.3, approved scope): sub-pill flips inside Ref no longer plant p:'fiber'/'cli'/'power'; stale legacy g/t states still restore correctly (guard lands the right Ref tab, then nav_restore's g/t replay re-activates the exact panel). ?legacy=1 pushes exactly as before. ACCEPTED NUANCES (documented, not regressions): back-swipe immediately after a Ref sub-pill flip is now a no-op (pre-B4 it coincidentally popped to the Ref grid via the leak-feeding push; the header grid-back is the designed in-page back); TRIAGE search hits toast + return to the Ref frame (their content has no rd home yet — data-pass backlog: add ref: keys or re-home); stale {p:'sop',d:'command'} restores double-render the Command Center (idempotent, stale-only); museum d:'ingest' states (≤v1.6.90) no longer re-open mscope (dead 8 major versions). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first) — default URL: (a) HANDOFF: Work›HANDOFF card and Command handoff tile → generator paints inside Work›Deploy, LOG button works, Back behaves; (b) Ref search: type 'flapping' → tap the TRIAGE hit → toast 'Not in the new UI yet' + you stay in the rd frame, NO legacy page flashes; type 'port map' → tap the OPS hit → lands the PORT MAP tool; (c) type 'parser' → lands Ref›CLI parser; (d) Deploy flow: open a deploy detail, ＋NEW scope, back-swipe through — wizard restores visibly, no legacy strip anywhere; (e) Ref pill flip (e.g. CLI›OOB) then back-swipe — expect NO-OP (grid-back is the back); confirm this is acceptable on device; (f) stale-history sanity: navigate around, then Back repeatedly to root — never a legacy 5-tab surface. Then ?legacy=1: tabs, ops strip pills, handoff generator (renders in #ops-content exactly as before), search hits open legacy pages, sub-pill Back behavior unchanged — byte-identical. ROLLBACK: revert the commit. Gates: 4 script blocks compile, CSS braces 3560 balanced, CRLF preserved, 3-stamp lockstep.
